hero.shortDescription: Senior Full-Stack Engineer and AI Systems Developer with over 14 years of experience designing and building scalable SaaS platforms, cloud-native infrastructure, and AI-powered applications. Proven expertise in developing LLM-driven systems, intelligent automation workflows, and data-driven platforms using modern technologies including Node.js, Python, React, and TypeScript.

workExperience.title: Artificial Intelligence Engineer | Senior Full-stack Developer
workExperience.subtitle: Webasen (Remote)
keyAccomplishment: Design and develop AI-powered web applications and automation systems integrating Large Language Models using the OpenAI API to enable intelligent content generation, data analysis, and workflow automation.
Build scalable backend services and APIs using Node.js and Python, implementing microservices architectures for high-performance data processing and AI-driven features.
Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines using vector embeddings and semantic search to improve accuracy of AI-generated responses and enterprise knowledge retrieval.
Develop modern frontend interfaces using React and TypeScript to deliver responsive, data-driven user experiences integrated with AI services.
Architect and deploy cloud-native applications across Amazon Web Services and Google Cloud Platform, ensuring scalability, reliability, and cost-efficient infrastructure.

workExperience.title: Full-stack Developer | AI Engineer | Project Manager
workExperience.subtitle: LocalSpark (Remote)
keyAccomplishment: Led the design and development of AI-powered SaaS platforms and analytics systems, integrating Large Language Models through the OpenAI API to enable intelligent automation, predictive insights, and data-driven decision making.
Architected and implemented scalable full-stack web applications using Node.js, Python, React, and TypeScript, delivering high-performance APIs and modern user interfaces for enterprise clients.
Managed and mentored cross-functional engineering teams in an Agile development environment, coordinating project planning, technical design, and product delivery.
Developed scalable REST and GraphQL APIs supporting large-scale data processing and real-time analytics systems.
Containerized and deployed applications using Docker and automated deployments through CI/CD pipelines for faster and reliable releases.
Collaborated closely with product stakeholders and business teams to translate technical architecture into scalable SaaS solutions used by multiple organizations.

workExperience.title: Full-stack Developer
workExperience.subtitle: BussinessInsuranceUSA (Remote)
keyAccomplishment: Developed and maintained scalable full-stack web applications supporting online insurance services, improving platform performance and user experience.
Built robust backend APIs and microservices using Node.js and Python to handle client data processing, authentication, and business logic for insurance-related workflows.
Designed and implemented responsive frontend interfaces using React and modern JavaScript frameworks to deliver seamless and intuitive user experiences.
Integrated third-party services and APIs to support payment processing, document management, and customer data systems.
Optimized database queries and backend logic using PostgreSQL and MongoDB to improve application performance and data reliability.
Implemented secure authentication systems and role-based access control to protect sensitive customer and policy information.
Deployed and maintained applications on cloud infrastructure including Amazon Web Services, ensuring reliable production environments.

workExperience.title: Full-stack Developer
workExperience.subtitle: LeadAction (Remote)
keyAccomplishment: Developed and maintained scalable SaaS platforms and web applications supporting marketing automation and customer engagement systems used by businesses to manage campaigns and communication workflows.
Designed and implemented high-performance backend services and RESTful APIs using Node.js and Python, enabling reliable data processing and integration with external services.
Built modern and responsive frontend applications using React and JavaScript, delivering intuitive dashboards and user interfaces for campaign management and analytics.
Implemented email and SMS automation workflows, supporting large-scale messaging infrastructure and customer engagement tools.
Designed and optimized database schemas and queries using PostgreSQL and MySQL to support high-volume transactional and analytics workloads.
Integrated third-party APIs for payment systems, marketing platforms, and communication services, expanding the platform’s automation capabilities.

workExperience.title: Intern | Full-stack Developer
workExperience.subtitle: Alpaca (Hybrid)
keyAccomplishment: Started as a software engineering intern and progressed into a Full-Stack Developer role, contributing to the development of internal tools and web-based applications.
Developed responsive frontend interfaces using JavaScript, HTML5, and CSS, improving usability and accessibility across desktop and mobile devices.
Participated in the development of database-driven applications, writing optimized queries and maintaining relational databases such as MySQL and PostgreSQL.
Contributed to the integration of third-party APIs and external services to extend application functionality.
Collaborated with senior engineers and designers to deliver product features, fix bugs, and improve overall platform performance.
Gained hands-on experience with software development lifecycle practices, version control systems, and Agile development workflows.

projects.title: Localspark
projects.description: Designed and implemented the AI-driven marketing analytics dashboard for small businesses. Built with PHP, Laravel, Vite, featuring real-time campaign insights, lead tracking, and automated performance reports powered by OpenAI and data visualization tools.

projects.title: Businessinsuranceusa
projects.description: I contributed to the modernization of the company’s insurance quoting platform, optimizing form workflows and integrating secure APIs for policy management. Improved load time and UX using React and RESTful backend integration.

projects.title: Wellnessentially
projects.description: A MERN Stack mobile and web application built for companies to help to lower stress and increase productivity and overall well-being of their employees. I developed the front end with React and Bootstrap and the back end using Node.js, Express.js, and Mongo and hosted it on Azure.

projects.title: Gardenkitchen
projects.description: Developed a responsive restaurant website featuring an online menu, table reservation system, and integrated order forms. Built with Shopify and TailwindCSS for speed and scalability, with a lightweight Node.js backend for contact and order APIs.

projects.title: Installeranalytics
projects.description: A SaaS analytics service for Windows installers. I worked on new report generation, analytics, presentation, and UI improvements for the front end along with DevOps, database administration, and RESTful microservices on the back-end side.

description: Senior Full-Stack Engineer and AI Systems Developer with over 14 years of experience designing and building scalable SaaS platforms, cloud-native infrastructure, and AI-powered applications. Proven expertise in developing LLM-driven systems, intelligent automation workflows, and data-driven platforms using modern technologies including Node.js, Python, React, and TypeScript. Experienced in integrating advanced AI capabilities using platforms such as OpenAI API, implementing retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), semantic search, and AI-powered analytics systems. Strong background in backend architecture, distributed systems, and API design, with production experience deploying cloud applications across Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud Platform, and Microsoft Azure. Skilled in designing high-performance APIs, microservices architectures, and scalable data pipelines, with hands-on expertise in containerized environments using Docker and Kubernetes. Adept at leading end-to-end system development, from architecture design to production deployment, while delivering reliable and maintainable software solutions for enterprise and startup environments. Passionate about building AI-driven products that combine machine intelligence with scalable cloud infrastructure to deliver real-world business impact.

education.degree: Generative AI with Large Language Models
